profile.name: Saatvik Gupta
profile.subtitle: CS Student | Cloud • AI • Data Analytics • Cybersecurity
profile.tagline: "Curiosity is my compass. Consistency is my habit."
profile.bio: Hi, I'm Saatvik — a 3rd year Computer Science student who believes the best way to learn is by actually doing. I don't wait for opportunities to come — I go out and create them. Passionate about using technology to solve real problems and create meaningful impact. Still finding my path, and I think that's okay — curiosity is my compass and consistency is my habit. Open to internships, collaborations, and opportunities.

experience.description: Completed a 2-month AWS internship program gaining hands-on exposure to Amazon Web Services and cloud computing fundamentals.
points: Provisioned and managed scalable cloud resources including Amazon EC2, Amazon S3, and AWS IAM roles.
Gained direct exposure to cloud network topologies, VPC configuration, and Solutions Architecture principles.
Built and deployed mock cloud infrastructure verifying best practices in security, load balancing, and high availability.

projects.name: EcoTrace — Carbon Footprint Platform
projects.description: A personal carbon footprint tracking platform built with HTML/CSS/JS. Features an interactive dashboard, activity logging, Chart.js analytics, AI coaching, and offline caching via localStorage.

detailedSpecs.techLog: Optimized paint threads by compiling vector assets as raw inline SVGs.

projects.name: Task Tracker Board
projects.description: An interactive task workspace with columns, categorization, status toggles, priority tags, and statistics dashboards. Keeps data synced locally for seamless client-side planning.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Local-first storage board modeling Kanban card columns.
milestones: Phase 2: Drag/drop state assertions & local storage triggers
Phase 3: Status counts & task progress counters
detailedSpecs.techLog: Isolated client local sync calls inside unified wrapper functions.

projects.name: Jack&Trades
projects.description: An AI ecosystem for cross-disciplinary discovery, currently being actively built with Next.js, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and the Gemini API, following a six-phase roadmap.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Split-tier router platform calling Gemini serverless models.
milestones: Phase 1: Base Next.js routing & visual structure config
Phase 2: Gemini API tokens & server endpoints setup
detailedSpecs.techLog: Leveraged Next.js dynamic routing to lazy-load resource graphs.

projects.name: EchoVerse (Music Recommendation)
projects.description: An AI-powered music recommendation app (no audio playback) using the Last.fm API, MusicBrainz, and the OpenAI API, being built in three sequential phases.

detailedSpecs.architecture: REST Client mapping sound characteristics against metadata indices.
milestones: Phase 2: OpenAI user query mood classification engine
detailedSpecs.techLog: Decoupled component nodes to allow direct API calls.

projects.name: Plagiarism Checker
projects.description: An algorithm-driven text analysis tool calculating document similarity ratios using TF-IDF vectorization and cosine similarity to compare multiple files and flag similarities.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Text parsing calculator hosted on a Flask interface.
milestones: Phase 2: TF-IDF vector calculations and Cosine similarity computation
Phase 3: Score comparison outputs & PDF matching display
detailedSpecs.techLog: Optimized vector parsing memory profiles by lazy-loading tooltips.

projects.name: Mean-Variance-Std Dev Calculator
projects.description: A mathematical statistics tool built with NumPy that converts array streams into 3x3 matrices, calculating values of mean, variance, standard deviation, max, min, and sum across rows and columns.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Data analytics pipeline mapping mathematical indices.
milestones: Phase 1: Dimension validation checks & shape manipulation
Phase 2: Mean, variance, and statistics computation
detailedSpecs.techLog: Direct NumPy calculations bypass row loops for speed.

projects.name: Cryptographic Encoder-Decoder
projects.description: A security utility program implementing customizable cryptography keys to encode and decode sensitive text messages, keeping calculations local and secure.

detailedSpecs.architecture: CLI utility applying cryptographic key translations.
milestones: Phase 1: Custom mapping key algorithms setup
detailedSpecs.techLog: Applied safe buffer scans to prevent variable overflows.

projects.name: Random Password Generator
projects.description: A high-security client-side web utility that generates cryptographically secure, randomized keys. Users can customize length, caps, numbers, and symbols.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Client browser page computing secure random strings.
milestones: Phase 1: Visual config checks (caps, numbers, symbols)
detailedSpecs.techLog: Used window.crypto.getRandomValues for true cryptographic security.

projects.name: Snake-Water-Gun Game
projects.description: An interactive game of Snake-Water-Gun featuring a gameplay session loop, score statistics tracking, and interactive computer selection rules.

detailedSpecs.architecture: State game loop calculating rule victories.
milestones: Phase 3: Points tabulation & continue query loop
detailedSpecs.techLog: Sanitized character scans to prevent invalid selections.
